titles.title: All I Want to See Is Jesus

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh, I know the time is near, Where everything that I hold dear Will lay before the Holy consuming fire All my works and all my deeds And every prayer said on my knees Will lay before the Holy consuming fire

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All I want to see is Jesus All I want to see is Him in me All I want to see is Jesus Shining through me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hurt and self-inflicted pain And everything that I thought gain Will lay before the Holy consuming fire Words of knowledge in His name And healing hands that touched the lame Will lay before Holy consuming fire

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And here Him say well done My precious one Well done, well done! My faithful one
